api_key.description: Codefresh API key. Sent verbatim (no Bearer prefix) as the Authorization header; used only for auth and never logged.

base_url.description: Codefresh API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account_id.description: Optional Codefresh account id; sent as the X-Access-Token header for account scoping. Omitted entirely when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
